questions.message: 🔧 Remove old/empty worktrees and prune references $ # Remove old sprint worktrees (confirmed clean) for d in /c/Workspaces/Intrale/platform.agent-1578-openapi-spec /c/Workspaces/Intrale/platform.agent-1631-empty-states-skeleton-home-dashboard "/c/Workspaces/Intrale/platform.agent-1631-empty-states-y-s…
questions.original_html: 🔐 Claude Code — PERMISO REQUERIDO [🚨 HIGH] 🤖 Agente 3 · 🔀 agent/676-asignacion-pedidos (#676) · 📌 Limpiando worktrees huérfanos… 🔧 Remove old/empty worktrees and prune references $ # Remove old sprint worktrees (confirmed clean) for d in /c/Workspaces/Intrale/platform.agent-1578-openapi-spec /c/Workspaces/Intrale/platform.agent-1631-empty-states-skeleton-home-dashboard "/c/Workspaces/Intrale/platform.agent-1631-empty-states-y-s… ⏳ Expira en 15 min 📝 Usar botones o responder: siempre (para persistir)

tool_input.command:
# Remove old sprint worktrees (confirmed clean)
for d in /c/Workspaces/Intrale/platform.agent-1578-openapi-spec /c/Workspaces/Intrale/platform.agent-1631-empty-states-skeleton-home-dashboard "/c/Workspaces/Intrale/platform.agent-1631-empty-states-y-skeleton-loading-para-hom" /c/Workspaces/Intrale/platform.agent-1632-accesibilidad-a11y-para-home-dashboard /c/Workspaces/Intrale/platform.agent-1634-qa-e2e-publicacion-productos /c/Workspaces/Intrale/platform.agent-676-asignacion-pedidos-repartidores; do
  name=$(basename "$d")
  if [ -d "$d" ]; then
    rm -rf "$d" 2>/dev/null && echo "✓ Removed $name" || echo "✗ Failed $name"
  fi
done
# Also clean temp worktree
rm -rf /c/Users/Administrator/AppData/Local/Temp/wt-1579 2>/dev/null && echo "✓ Removed wt-1579" || echo "✗ Failed wt-1579"
# Prune git worktree references
git worktree prune 2>/dev/null && echo "✓ Git worktree prune done"
tool_input.description: Remove old/empty worktrees and prune references
